# PromptKit

> Professional LLM development framework for Go. Build, test, and deploy production-ready LLM applications.

PromptKit is an open-source Go framework for building LLM-powered applications. It provides a modular runtime for LLM provider integration, a prompt testing framework (Arena), an SDK for application developers, and CLI tools for prompt pack management.

## Key Components

- **Arena (PromptArena)**: Prompt testing and evaluation framework with multi-provider support, scenario-based testing, assertions, guardrails, self-play, workflow testing, and CI/CD integration.
- **SDK**: Developer-facing API for building LLM applications — `Open()`, `Send()`, streaming, tool integration, state management, variable providers, and event-driven observability.
- **Runtime**: Core engine — LLM provider adapters (OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini, Ollama, vLLM), pipeline stages, tool execution, workflow state machine, memory, MCP integration, and event bus.
- **PackC**: CLI tool for compiling, validating, and managing PromptPack files (prompt configurations with templates, variables, tools, and validators).

## Documentation

- [Arena Overview](https://promptarena.altairalabs.ai/arena/)
- [SDK Overview](https://promptkit.altairalabs.ai/sdk/)
- [Runtime Overview](https://promptkit.altairalabs.ai/runtime/)
